narrative:
Fallsbury Twp township has 613 registered voters, with 52.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.4 percentage points.
